The '''hiakk tree''' was a [[Tree/Legends|tree]] native to [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]]. Hiakks had [[Silver/Legends|silvery]] trunks, and reached 200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height. The [[Hajial Chase]] was a large hiakk forest on New Plympto. [[Rikknit/Legends|Rikknits]] dwelled in the high branches of hiakk trees, spinning web-nests.
